title: Chorus Juice
description: Chorus juice and chorus juice accessories! Includes two potion effects and the means to access said potions.
body:
Hello there!
This mod adds Chorus Juice and its' "juiced up" status effect.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Which attempts to teleport the entity with the effect between 1-10 blocks away if it takes damage. Think endermen.

</details>

Now also adds Chorus Cola, a powerful multi-buff potion with downsides...

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Chorus Cola is strong stuff, so a mild-ish set of debuffs will be applied once the sugar rush is over.
If you drink Chorus Cola while still on or recovering from another dose, you may find yourself saddled with far stronger debuffs!

</details>

Also adds the ability to squeeze juice from Chorus fruits in the brewing stand. Let me know if you have issues with the potion effects. I tested them and so far, so good.
Note that you need _EMPTY_ bottles to fill them with juice!
Chorus Cola is made by adding sugar to juice.

Made with MCreator.
